records.subject: Announcement on behalf of subsidiary Chang Hwa Bank Venture Capital Co., Ltd. for the acquisition of the right-of-use assets from a related party.
records.fund_name:
Name and nature of the underlying asset (e.g., land located at Sublot XX,
Lot XX, North District, Taichung City):Part of the office space located in
10th floor and 1 basement parking spaces at No. 57, Section 2, Zhongshan
North Road, Zhongshan District, Taipei City.
records.commitment_amount_raw:
Transaction unit amount (e.g.XX square meters, equivalent to XX ping),
unit price, and total transaction price:
The lease agreement is 67.19 ping office space and 1 basement parking spaces.
The rent of the office is NT$2,843 per ping per month, amounting to
NT$191,000 (tax included), and the monthly rent of each parking space is
NT$11,500 (tax included). Thus, the monthly rent is NT$202,500 in total, and
the value of the right-of-use assets is NT$9,815,596.
